revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:R with history]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] 6205 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R with history |name=With history |from=a page containing [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}|action=history}} '''substantive page history'''] |info=This page is kept as a redirect to preserve its former content and attributions. Please ''do not'' remove the tag that generates this text (unless the need to recreate content on this page has been demonstrated), nor delete this page. ** This template should not be used for redirects having some edit history but no meaningful content in their previous versions, nor for redirects created as a result of a [[Wikipedia:Merging|page merge]] (use {{tl|R from merge}} instead), nor for redirects from a title that forms a historic part of Wikipedia (use {{tl|R with old history}} instead). |all category=Redirects with history }} {{documentation}}

{{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R with history |name=With history |from=a page containing [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}|action=history}} '''substantive page history'''] |info=This page is kept as a redirect to preserve its former content and attributions. Please ''do not'' remove the tag that generates this text (unless the need to recreate content on this page has been demonstrated), nor delete this page. ** This template should not be used for redirects having some edit history but no meaningful content in their previous versions, nor for redirects created as a result of a [[Wikipedia:Merging|page merge]] (use {{tl|R from merge}} instead), nor for redirects from a title that forms a historic part of Wikipedia (use {{tl|R with old history}} instead). |all category=Redirects with history }} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: {{This is a redirect/rcat}} {{Redirect template |id=R with history |name=With history |from=a page containing [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}|action=history}} '''substantive page history'''] |info=This page is kept as a redirect to preserve its former content and attributions. Please ''do not'' remove the tag that generates this text (unless the need to recreate content on this page has been demonstrated), nor delete this page. ** This template should not be used for redirects having some edit history but no meaningful content in their previous versions, nor for redirects created as a result of a [[Wikipedia:Merging|page merge]] (use {{tl|R from merge}} instead), nor for redirects from a title that forms a historic part of Wikipedia (use {{tl|R with old history}} instead). |all category=Redirects with history }} {{documentation}} [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:R with history]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
